site.title: poesia.pics
site.description: Ephemeral poems born from your images
landing.headline: Your image, a poem
landing.subtitle: Upload a photo and let artificial intelligence write a poem for it. Every creation is unique and ephemeral — it disappears in 24 hours.
generate.title: Generate your poem
generate.upload_hint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 10 MB.
poem.expired_message: Poems on poesia.pics are ephemeral — they live for only 24 hours, like the moments that inspired them.
moods.melancholic.description: Verses that embrace nostalgia and the beauty of what is lost
moods.romantic.description: Words that celebrate love and tenderness
moods.erotic.description: Sensual poetry that explores desire and passion
errors.invalid_file_type: File must be JPG, PNG, or WebP
errors.voice_required: You must choose a poetic voice
errors.generation_failed: We couldn't generate your poem. Please try again.
errors.generation_refused: Content could not be generated for this combination. Try a different mood.
errors.rate_limited: You've generated too many poems. Wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
